P

p4State - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the USPS 4-State barcode reading capabilities.
pAus - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the Australia Post barcode reading capabilities.
Pdf417 - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Pdf417 is the class that configures the PDF 417 Symbology.
Pdf417(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.Pdf417
This is the constructor of Pdf417.
pdf417 - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the PDF417 barcode reading capabilities.
PDF417_CHARACTER_SET_MODE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
PDF417_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
PDF417_LENGTH1 - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
PDF417_LENGTH2 - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
PDF417_LENGTH_CONTROL - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
PDF417_USER_ID - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
PICKLIST_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
picklistEnable - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerOptions
picklistEnable limits reading to targeted selection.
pJap - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the Japan Post barcode reading capabilities.
pKix - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the KIX barcode reading capabilities.
PostalAustralian - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
PostalAustralian is the class that configures the Postal Australian.
PostalAustralian(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.PostalAustralian
This is the constructor of PostalAustralian.
PostalJapan - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
PostalJapan is the class that configures the Postal Japan.
PostalJapan(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.PostalJapan
This is the constructor of PostalJapan.
PostalKix - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
PostalKix is the class that configures the Postal Kix.
PostalKix(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.PostalKix
This is the constructor of PostalKix.
PostalRoyalMail - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
PostalRoyalMail is the class that configures the Postal Royal Mail.
PostalRoyalMail(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.PostalRoyalMail
This is the constructor of PostalRoyalMail.
PostalUsPlanet - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
PostalUsPlanet is the class that configures the Postal US Planet.

This is the constructor of PostalUsPlanet.
PostalUsPostnet - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
PostalUsPostnet is the class that configures the Postal US Postnet.

This is the constructor of PostalUsPostnet.

PostalUsps4State is the class that configures the Postal USPS4State.

This is the constructor of PostalUsps4State.
POWER_SERVICE_ERROR - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.device.DeviceException
It is an Power Service error.
pPlanet - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the US PLANET barcode reading capabilities.
pPostnet - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the US POSTNET barcode reading capabilities.
pRM - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the Royal Mail barcode reading capabilities.
Property<T> - com.android.device.configuration中的类
Property is the abstract class that represents a generic Property of type T.
Property(int) - 类 的构造器com.android.device.configuration.Property
Constructor of Property.
PropertyEditor - com.android.device.configuration中的接口
PropertyEditor is the interface to get and set properties from/to the underlying subsystem.
PropertyGetter - com.android.device.configuration中的接口
PropertyGetter is the interface to get properties from/to the underlying subsystem.
PropertyGroup - com.android.device.configuration中的类
PropertyGroup contains properties and/or other property groups.
PropertyGroup() - 类 的构造器com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGroup
This is an empty constructor, in the implementation MUST be implemented.
PropertyID - com.android.decode中的类
PropertyID is the class that includes all the properties identifiers.
PropertyID() - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.PropertyID
